---
title: Claude's construction of Knuth's cycles
date: 2026-03-13
order: 20260313
toc: false
css: styles.css
description: A visualization of Claude's construction of Knuth's cycles
image: social_image.png
bluesky-comments:
  profile: did:plc:da35a6l2asjpf5y4fmyc662t
---


```{ojs}
viewof inputs = Inputs.form([
  Inputs.radio([3,4,5,6,7,8], {label: "Size:", value: 4}),
  Inputs.radio([1,2,3], {label: "Cycle:", value: 1})
])
```

```{ojs}
import {make_graph3D} from './components/make_graph3D.js';
make_graph3D(inputs[0], {
  cycleIndex: inputs[1] % 3,
  cycleSpeed: 1.5*inputs[0],
  cycleLinewidth: 2,
  pointSize: 0.05*inputs[0],
  cycleMarkerRadius: inputs[0] == 3 ? 0.1 : 0.15
})

```
